# DIY Manual

Practical command cookbook for running X2Chess end-to-end from terminal cells (including Quarto).

Use this from repository root unless a section says otherwise.

## Quick Start (Most Used)

> Note: Start backend and frontend in separate terminals because both commands are long-running.
> Note: X2Chess backend uses port `8011` so it does not collide with TPLK backend (`8000`).

### 1) Check and remove stale dev processes (recommended before start)

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess
echo "Before cleanup:"
lsof -i tcp:8011 || true
lsof -i tcp:5173 || true

# Graceful stop first
lsof -ti tcp:8011 | xargs -r kill -15
lsof -ti tcp:5173 | xargs -r kill -15
sleep 1

# If still running, force stop
lsof -ti tcp:8011 | xargs -r kill -9
lsof -ti tcp:5173 | xargs -r kill -9

echo "After cleanup:"
lsof -i tcp:8011 || true
lsof -i tcp:5173 || true
```

### 2) Start backend (Terminal A)

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/backend

# Optional: first-time setup
# python3 -m venv .venv
# source .venv/bin/activate
# pip install -r requirements.txt

source .venv/bin/activate
uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8011
```

### 3) Start frontend (Terminal B)

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/frontend

# Optional: first-time setup
# npm install

npm run dev
```

### 4) Verify both services are up

```{bash}
curl -sS http://localhost:8011/health
open http://localhost:5173
```

## Useful Scripts

### Install/update dependencies

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/backend
source .venv/bin/activate
pip install -r requirements.txt

cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/frontend
npm install
```

### Build frontend for production

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/frontend
npm run build
```

### Run backend only (without auto-reload)

```{bash}
cd /Users/stephan/Workspace/X2Chess/backend
source .venv/bin/activate
uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8011
```

### Quick health check loop

```{bash}
while true; do
  date
  curl -sS http://localhost:8011/health || echo "backend not reachable"
  sleep 2
done
```

### Stop local dev services quickly

```{bash}
lsof -ti tcp:8011 | xargs -r kill -9
lsof -ti tcp:5173 | xargs -r kill -9
```
